question_text: A wind turbine generates 500 kW of electrical power. How much energy does it produce in 2 hours?
explanation: Energy = Power × Time. With power = 500 kW and time = 2 hours, energy = 500 × 2 = 1000 kWh. You can also convert to joules: 1000 kWh = 1,000,000 Wh = 3,600,000 kJ (since 1 Wh = 3600 J).
